lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਤੇਰੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਚਾਲੈ ਝੂਠੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu mohu maaeaa terai sang na chaalai jhootthee preet lagaaee |
lines.english: This emotional attachment to Maya shall not go with you; it is false to fall in love with it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲੀ ਰੈਣਿ ਗੁਦਰੀ ਅੰਧਿਆਰੀ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sagalee rain gudaree andhiaaree sev satigur chaanan hoe |
lines.english: The entire night of your life has passed away in darkness; but by serving the True Guru, the Divine Light shall dawn within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਚਉਥੈ ਪਹਰੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਨੇੜੈ ਆਇਆ ਸੋਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak praanee chauthai paharai din nerrai aaeaa soe |4|
lines.english: Says Nanak, O mortal, in the fourth watch of the night, that day is drawing near! ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਰਤੀ ਬਿਲਮ ਨ ਦੇਵਨੀ ਵਣਜਾਰਿਆ ਮਿਤ੍ਰਾ ਓਨੀ ਤਕੜੇ ਪਾਏ ਹਾਥ ॥
lines.translit: eik ratee bilam na devanee vanajaariaa mitraa onee takarre paae haath |
lines.english: You are not allowed a moment's delay, O my merchant friend; the Messenger of Death seizes you with firm hands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਿਖਿਆ ਆਇਆ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਕਾ ਵਣਜਾਰਿਆ ਮਿਤ੍ਰਾ ਉਠਿ ਚਲੇ ਕਮਾਣਾ ਸਾਥਿ ॥
lines.translit: likhiaa aaeaa govind kaa vanajaariaa mitraa utth chale kamaanaa saath |
lines.english: Receiving the summons from the Lord of the Universe, O my merchant friend, you must arise and depart with the actions you have committed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਿਖਿਆ ਆਇਆ ਪਕੜਿ ਚਲਾਇਆ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਸਦਾ ਦੁਹੇਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: likhiaa aaeaa pakarr chalaaeaa manamukh sadaa duhele |
lines.english: Receiving the summons, people are seized and dispatched. The self-willed manmukhs are miserable forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਪੂਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਸੇ ਦਰਗਹ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਹੇਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: jinee pooraa satigur seviaa se daragah sadaa suhele |
lines.english: But those who serve the Perfect True Guru are forever happy in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਧਰਤੀ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਜੁਗ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੋ ਬੋਵੈ ਸੋ ਖਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: karam dharatee sareer jug antar jo bovai so khaat |
lines.english: The body is the field of karma in this age; whatever you plant, you shall harvest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਭਗਤ ਸੋਹਹਿ ਦਰਵਾਰੇ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਸਦਾ ਭਵਾਤਿ ॥੫॥੧॥੪॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak bhagat soheh daravaare manamukh sadaa bhavaat |5|1|4|
lines.english: Says Nanak, the devotees look beautiful in the Court of the Lord; the self-willed manmukhs wander forever in reincarnation. ||5||1||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਘਰੁ ੨ ਛੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 4 ghar 2 chhant |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fourth Mehl, Second House, Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਧ ਇਆਣੀ ਪੇਈਅੜੈ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪਿਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: mundh eaanee peeearrai kiau kar har darasan pikhai |
lines.english: How can the ignorant soul-bride obtain the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan, while she is in this world of her father's home?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਅਪਨੀ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਹੁਰੜੈ ਕੰਮ ਸਿਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: har har apanee kirapaa kare guramukh saahurarrai kam sikhai |
lines.english: When the Lord Himself grants His Grace, the Gurmukh learns the duties of her Husband's Celestial Home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹੀਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਫਿਰੈ ਸੁਹੇਲੀ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਬਾਹ ਲੁਡਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: saheea vich firai suhelee har daragah baah luddaae |
lines.english: She walks happily among her companions, and in the Lord's Court, she swings her arms joyfully.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹੁਰੜੈ ਕੰਮ ਸਿਖੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: saahurarrai kam sikhai guramukh har har sadaa dhiaae |
lines.english: The Gurmukh learns the duties of her Husband's Celestial Home; she meditates forever on the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖਾ ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ਕੀ ਬਾਕੀ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਿਰਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: lekhaa dharam raae kee baakee jap har har naam kirakhai |
lines.english: Her account is cleared by the Righteous Judge of Dharma, when she chants the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਧ ਇਆਣੀ ਪੇਈਅੜੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦਿਖੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mundh eaanee peeearrai guramukh har darasan dikhai |1|
lines.english: The ignorant soul-bride becomes Gurmukh, and gains the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan, while she is still in her father's house. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੀਆਹੁ ਹੋਆ ਮੇਰੇ ਬਾਬੁਲਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖੇ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: veeaahu hoaa mere baabulaa guramukhe har paaeaa |
lines.english: My marriage has been performed, O my father. As Gurmukh, I have found the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਅੰਧੇਰਾ ਕਟਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਚੰਡੁ ਬਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: agiaan andheraa kattiaa gur giaan prachandd balaaeaa |
lines.english: The darkness of ignorance has been dispelled. The Guru has revealed the blazing light of spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਅੰਧੇਰਾ ਬਿਨਸਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਰਤਨੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਲਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: baliaa gur giaan andheraa binasiaa har ratan padaarath laadhaa |
lines.english: This spiritual wisdom given by the Guru shines forth, and the darkness has been dispelled. I have found the Priceless Jewel of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਗਇਆ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਥਾ ਆਪੁ ਆਪੈ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਖਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: haumai rog geaa dukh laathaa aap aapai guramat khaadhaa |
lines.english: The sickness of my ego has been dispelled, and my pain is over and done. Through the Guru's Teachings, my identity has consumed my identical identity.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਵਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਨਾ ਕਦੇ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: akaal moorat var paaeaa abinaasee naa kade marai na jaaeaa |
lines.english: I have obtained my Husband Lord, the Akaal Moorat, the Undying Form. He is Imperishable; He shall never die, and He shall never ever leave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੀਆਹੁ ਹੋਆ ਮੇਰੇ ਬਾਬੋਲਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖੇ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: veeaahu hoaa mere baabolaa guramukhe har paaeaa |2|
lines.english: My marriage has been performed, O my father. As Gurmukh, I have found the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਤਿ ਸਤੇ ਮੇਰੇ ਬਾਬੁਲਾ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਮਿਲਿ ਜੰਞ ਸੁਹੰਦੀ ॥
lines.translit: har sat sate mere baabulaa har jan mil jany suhandee |
lines.english: The Lord is the Truest of the True, O my father. Meeting with the humble servants of the Lord, the marriage procession looks beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਵਕੜੈ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਸੁਹੇਲੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਸਾਹੁਰੜੈ ਖਰੀ ਸੋਹੰਦੀ ॥
lines.translit: pevakarrai har jap suhelee vich saahurarrai kharee sohandee |
lines.english: She who chants the Lord's Name is happy in this world of her father's home, and in the next world of her Husband Lord, she shall be very beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹੁਰੜੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਖਰੀ ਸੋਹੰਦੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਪੇਵਕੜੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: saahurarrai vich kharee sohandee jin pevakarrai naam samaaliaa |
lines.english: In her Husband Lord's Celestial Home, she shall be most beautiful, if she has remembered the Naam in this world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਸਫਲਿਓ ਜਨਮੁ ਤਿਨਾ ਦਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਿਨਾ ਮਨੁ ਜਿਣਿ ਪਾਸਾ ਢਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh safalio janam tinaa daa guramukh jinaa man jin paasaa dtaaliaa |
lines.english: Fruitful are the lives of those who, as Gurmukh, have conquered their minds-they have won the game of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਮਿਲਿ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਸੋਹਿਆ ਵਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਨੰਦੀ ॥
lines.translit: har sant janaa mil kaaraj sohiaa var paaeaa purakh anandee |
lines.english: Joining with the humble Saints of the Lord, my actions bring prosperity, and I have obtained the Lord of Bliss as my Husband.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਬਾਬੁਲਾ ਹਰਿ ਦੇਵਹੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਮੈ ਦਾਜੋ ॥
lines.translit: har prabh mere baabulaa har devahu daan mai daajo |
lines.english: O my father, give me the Name of the Lord God as my wedding gift and dowry.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਮੇਰੇ ਬਾਬੋਲਾ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਮਿਲਿ ਜੰਞ ਸੋੁਹੰਦੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har sat sat mere baabolaa har jan mil jany souhandee |3|
lines.english: The Lord is the Truest of the True, O my father. Joining with the humble servants of the Lord, the marriage party has been embellished. ||3||
